message.content:
Implement the following plan:

# Clean Up Cupel Project

## Context
The project currently has demo/scaffolding code carried over from initial development (keystroke tracking, keyboard layout display, reset button, content echo). The user wants to keep only the text input component and the git log --oneline output display.

## Changes

### `src/app.rs`
- **Remove** `recent_keystrokes` field from `CupelWorkspace`
- **Remove** `on_reset_click` method from `CupelWorkspace`
- **Remove** from `CupelWorkspace::render`:
  - Header bar (keyboard layout label + Reset button)
  - Content echo div (`format!("{}", self.text_input.read(cx).content)`)
- **Keep**: `TextInput` component (all of it), `TextElement`, `command_output` display, `CupelWorkspace` struct (trimmed)
- **Remove** unused imports after cleanup (e.g. `Keystroke`, `yellow`, `opaque_grey`, `black`, `MouseButton` for workspace, etc.)

### `src/main.rs`
- **Remove** `cx.observe_keystrokes(...)` block
- **Remove** `cx.on_keyboard_layout_change(...)` block
- **Remove** `view_for_keystrokes` variable
- **Remove** `recent_keystrokes: vec![]` from `CupelWorkspace` init
- **Keep**: window setup, key bindings, TextInput creation, git log spawn, focus/activate, Quit action

## Files to modify
- `src/app.rs`
- `src/main.rs`

## Verification
- `cargo build` compiles without errors or warnings
- Run the app and confirm: text input works, git log output displays


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/denny/.claude/projects/-Users-denny-Documents-repos-cupel/bbd2eccb-31ba-4cf6-a9b4-a73935ee21db.jsonl

planContent:
# Clean Up Cupel Project

## Context
The project currently has demo/scaffolding code carried over from initial development (keystroke tracking, keyboard layout display, reset button, content echo). The user wants to keep only the text input component and the git log --oneline output display.

## Changes

### `src/app.rs`
- **Remove** `recent_keystrokes` field from `CupelWorkspace`
- **Remove** `on_reset_click` method from `CupelWorkspace`
- **Remove** from `CupelWorkspace::render`:
  - Header bar (keyboard layout label + Reset button)
  - Content echo div (`format!("{}", self.text_input.read(cx).content)`)
- **Keep**: `TextInput` component (all of it), `TextElement`, `command_output` display, `CupelWorkspace` struct (trimmed)
- **Remove** unused imports after cleanup (e.g. `Keystroke`, `yellow`, `opaque_grey`, `black`, `MouseButton` for workspace, etc.)

### `src/main.rs`
- **Remove** `cx.observe_keystrokes(...)` block
- **Remove** `cx.on_keyboard_layout_change(...)` block
- **Remove** `view_for_keystrokes` variable
- **Remove** `recent_keystrokes: vec![]` from `CupelWorkspace` init
- **Keep**: window setup, key bindings, TextInput creation, git log spawn, focus/activate, Quit action

## Files to modify
- `src/app.rs`
- `src/main.rs`

## Verification
- `cargo build` compiles without errors or warnings
- Run the app and confirm: text input works, git log output displays

content.text:
Now I'll make all the edits.

**app.rs changes:**

content.content: The file /Users/denny/Documents/repos/cupel/src/app.rs has been updated successfully.

lines: App, Bounds, ClipboardItem, Context, CursorStyle, ElementId, ElementInputHandler, Entity,

+    EntityInputHandler, FocusHandle, Focusable, GlobalElementId, LayoutId, MouseButton,
MouseDownEvent, MouseMoveEvent, MouseUpEvent, PaintQuad, Pixels, Point, ShapedLine,
-    SharedString, Style, TextRun, UTF16Selection, UnderlineStyle, Window, actions, black, div,
-    fill, hsla, opaque_grey, point, prelude::*, px, relative, rgb, rgba, size, white, yellow,
+    SharedString, Style, TextRun, UTF16Selection, UnderlineStyle, Window, actions, div, fill,
+    hsla, point, prelude::*, px, relative, rgb, rgba, size, white,

content.content: The file /Users/denny/Documents/repos/cupel/src/app.rs has been updated successfully.

input.old_string:
impl CupelWorkspace {
    fn on_reset_click(&mut self, _: &MouseUpEvent, _window: &mut Window, cx: &mut Context<Self>) {
        self.recent_keystrokes.clear();
        self.text_input
            .update(cx, |text_input, _cx| text_input.reset());
        cx.notify();
    }
}

impl Render for CupelWorkspace {
    fn render(&mut self, _window: &mut Window, cx: &mut Context<Self>) -> impl IntoElement {
        div()
            .bg(rgb(0xaaaaaa))
            .track_focus(&self.focus_handle(cx))
            .flex()
            .flex_col()
            .size_full()
            .child(
                div()
                    .bg(white())
                    .border_b_1()
                    .border_color(black())
                    .flex()
                    .flex_row()
                    .justify_between()
                    .child(format!("Keyboard {}", cx.keyboard_layout().name()))
                    .child(
                        div()
                            .border_1()
                            .border_color(black())
                            .px_2()
                            .bg(yellow())
                            .child("Reset")
                            .hover(|style| {
                                style
                                    .bg(yellow().blend(opaque_grey(0.5, 0.5)))
                                    .cursor_pointer()
                            })
                            .on_mouse_up(MouseButton::Left, cx.listener(Self::on_reset_click)),
                    ),
            )
            .child(self.text_input.clone())
            .child(
                div()
                    .p(px(4.))
                    .bg(white())
                    .border_1()
                    .border_color(black())
                    .child(format!("{}", self.text_input.read(cx).content)),
            )
            .child(
                div()
                    .p(px(4.))
                    .bg(white())
                    .child(self.command_output.clone())
            )
    }
}

content.text:
Clean build, no errors or warnings. Here's a summary of what was removed:

**`src/app.rs`:**
- Removed `Keystroke`, `black`, `opaque_grey`, `yellow` from imports
- Removed `recent_keystrokes` field from `CupelWorkspace`
- Removed `on_reset_click` method
- Removed header bar (keyboard layout label + Reset button) and content echo div from `render`
- Removed unused `reset` method from `TextInput`

**`src/main.rs`:**
- Removed `AppContext` → added back (was needed for `cx.new()`)
- Removed `recent_keystrokes: vec![]` from workspace init
- Removed `view_for_keystrokes` variable
- Removed `cx.observe_keystrokes(...)` block
- Removed `cx.on_keyboard_layout_change(...)` block
